mapper.sql: id, change_parref_id, change_type, member, name, work_code, person_type, ranking, title, edu_level, sex, dept_id, rely_unit, dept_unit_name, orig_member_id, note, work_ratio
mapper.select: select spicm.id as rowId, spicm.member as member, puser.name as memberName, ccspt.code as personType, ccspt.name as personTypeName, puser.account as workCode,spicm.orig_member_id as origMemberId, spicm.edu_level as eduLevel,csel.name as eduLevelName, sauthororder.code as ranking,sauthororder.name as rankingName, spicm.title as title,ccsti.name as titleName,spicm.change_type as changeType, case when spicm.change_type="1" then '调整入' when spicm.change_type="2" then '调整出' else '' END as changeTypeName from srm_projects_info_change_member spicm left join ct_srm_user puser on puser.id=spicm.member left join ct_srm_person_type ccspt on ccspt.code=spicm.person_type left join ct_srm_title_info ccsti on ccsti.code=spicm.title left join ct_srm_edu_level csel on csel.code=spicm.edu_level left join ct_srm_paper_author_order sauthororder on sauthororder.code=spicm.ranking where spicm.change_parref_id=#{parentId}
mapper.delete: delete from srm_projects_info_change_member spicm where spicm.change_parref_id=#{parentId}
